name: Lemoned Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove large leaves and tough parts of the broccoli stalks.
2. Score the ends of the broccoli stalks.
3. Place the water, cooking rack, and broccoli in a 6-quart Presto pressure cooker.
4. Sprinkle the broccoli lightly with seasonings and add the lemon slices.
5. Close the pressure cooker cover securely.
6. Place the pressure regulator on the vent pipe.
7. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes at 15 pounds pressure, rocking the pressure regulator slowly.
8. Cool the cooker immediately.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
